case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ERIBERTO AMALIO CATZIN QUETZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-21-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR, COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ERIBERTO AMALIO CATZIN QUETZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT QUETZ, ERIBERTO AMALIO CATZIN CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-21-2019 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT QUETZ, ERIBERTO AMALIO CATZIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
